title: Bare Bones x RAY's 3D Ladders
description: Bare Bones textures for RAY's 3D Ladders !
body:
![Ray's 3D Ladders logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ff87ed0f9750218c8c212adc9cdb126f26c12ab0.png)
-----------

This resource pack adds Bare Bones textures for [RAY's 3D Ladders](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/rays-3d-ladders) !

⚙️You have to place it above the default RAY's 3D Ladders in the resource pack list

- This resource pack is contained in [Bare Bones x Mods](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/bare-bones-x-mods) ! It's a more convenient way to use my Bare Bones compatibility packs

> [Bare Bones x RAY's 3D Rails](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/bare-bones-x-rays-3d-rails) is also available !
